title: Kay Chapman
compiled_truth: Kay Chapman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-07), Kay Chapman sent 209 and received 632 emails, totalling 841 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kimberly Hillis](people/kimberly-hillis) (121), [Janet Dietrich](people/janet-dietrich) (98), [Marsha Schiller](people/marsha-schiller) (94), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (93), [Christy Chapman](people/christy-chapman) (90). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, sent.
